scope: Complete the 100-agent discovery pilot round-trip by recombining cluster packets into one program input packet

decision_context.prior_state: The pilot scaffold could be split into cluster packets, but there was no repo-local way to merge completed cluster tranches back into one canonicalization-ready packet.
decision_context.decision: Add a cluster-packet merge command, preserve scaffold metadata across the split and merge flow, and generate the recombined pilot packet under research/meta.
decision_context.why_now: Without recombination, the 100-agent pilot flow still stopped short of a real canonicalization handoff.

files_expected.purpose: Adds cluster-packet recombination and preserves scaffold metadata in the round-trip.
Stores the merged program packet ready for canonicalization after real collection.
Explains the completed round-trip and the metadata-preservation fix.

planned_steps: Add a merge helper for discovery cluster packets
Preserve cluster plan and collection rules across split and merge
Generate the recombined pilot packet and rerun the focused regression suite

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The recombined packet contains all 100 agent submissions
The recombined packet preserves the cluster plan and collection rules
The focused regression suite stays green

guardrails: Do not fabricate discovery content while testing the round-trip
Keep the recombined packet canonicalization-ready but still exploratory
Preserve all scaffold metadata across the split/merge boundary
